commissioning.title: EnOcean BLE Auto-Commissioning
commissioning.description:
Activate auto-commissioning on {name}:

1. Hold button 1 for 7 seconds
2. Click button 1 briefly
3. Hold button 1 again for 7 seconds
4. Click button 1 briefly again

You have 2 minutes. Retry if needed.

progress.waiting_commissioning: Waiting for commissioning telegram. Follow the instructions and retry if needed...

abort.no_bluetooth_discovery: This setup must start from a discovered Bluetooth device.
abort.not_enocean_prefix: This discovered device does not use the EnOcean BLE MAC prefix (E2:15).

error.commissioning_not_detected: No commissioning telegram received within 2 minutes. Try again.
error.invalid_commissioning: A commissioning telegram was received but could not be parsed.
